positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial compass rose intersecting a stylized forest scene. The central element is a glowing, ethereal compass pointing towards a vibrant, crescent moon and abstract constellations. Surrounding the compass are detailed silhouettes of ancient, stylized trees (oak, birch), geometric celestial arcs, and small, whimsical woodland creatures like hummingbirds and stylized owls, all integrated into the design. Use a color palette of deep indigo, cosmic sapphire, warm gold leaf accents, and jade green. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, perfect for a repeating pattern or a single-focus apparel print. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Astrological/Botanical blueprint illustration. Clean line work, strong negative space, high contrast, vector illustration quality, suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment printing.
negative: blurry, artifact, poor anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, watermark, text, logo, signature, cartoon, realism, jpeg artifacts, noise, low detail, monochrome
